User-friendly workflow
OverviewLab TestsMedicines
OverviewLab TestsMedicines

Backend contract

Uses the live endpoints from `/api/v1`, including medicine warnings and lab test search.

Quick routes

Safety checkerDisease suggestions

Overview

Clinical workflow frontend

A cleaner frontend around the current backend modules. The main workflows are separated by task so users can search, inspect, and validate prescriptions with less friction.

Improved usability

1. Search

Find medicines or lab tests quickly with guided entry points.

2. Review

Open product details, dose templates, and disease suggestions.

3. Validate

Run warning checks before finalizing a prescription decision.

Open workflow

Lab test search

Browse and filter active lab tests from PostgreSQL.

Built around the current API contract and optimized for task-based navigation.
Open workflow

Medicine explorer

Search brands, generics, dose templates, and product details.

Built around the current API contract and optimized for task-based navigation.
Open workflow

Warning checker

Check interactions, contraindications, pregnancy, and lactation risk.

Built around the current API contract and optimized for task-based navigation.
Open workflow

Disease suggestions

Load medicine suggestions for a known disease ID.

Built around the current API contract and optimized for task-based navigation.
